subcodes.first_line: O handmaid of God, the All-Compelling, the Self-Subsisting! Be thou not sorrowful. This is the pathway of God, and such difficulties must needs arise [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای امه الله المهیمن القیوم محزون مباش این راه خداست البته چنین مشکلات حاصل
subcodes.subjects: @consolation and comfort, @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering
